title: beatonia houttei
intro: Beatonia houttei, also known as Houtte's beatonia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of beatonia houttei include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of beatonia houttei often involve infusions of its leaves and roots, which can be consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
